one_liner: Stripe offers a broad, mature REST API for payments and fintech operations with self-serve API key access and an official hosted MCP server for AI agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: HTTP Basic Auth using secret API key as username (no password).
Bearer token auth with secret API key, recommended for cross-origin requests.
Available for Stripe Connect platform integrations and Stripe Apps.

self_serve_notes: Sign up and get API keys immediately; no free tier fees but pay-as-you-go pricing model with no setup/monthly fee required to start using the API (test mode is free).

api_surface.notes: Extremely broad REST API covering payments, billing, connect, customers, disputes, payouts, etc. Also offers SDKs in many languages.

evidence.supports: Describes HTTP Basic Auth with secret API key and Bearer auth for cross-origin requests.
Details OAuth 2.0 and Restricted API key options for Stripe Apps.
Confirms pay-as-you-go pricing with no free tier fees but self-serve signup.
Shows self-serve API usage example for creating prices/products immediately after signup.
